board_deliberation.interpreted_objective: Verify the API key fix by summarizing current RPGPO mission priorities.
board_deliberation.expected_outcome: A concise paragraph summarizing current RPGPO mission priorities, confirming the API key fix is effective.
key_unknowns: Current RPGPO mission priorities
Status of API key fix
board_deliberation.recommended_strategy: First, audit the current state of the API key fix and gather information on RPGPO mission priorities. Then, decide if the API key fix is functioning correctly. Implement the fix if needed, and report the summary of mission priorities.
approval_points: Decision on whether the API key fix is functioning correctly

subtasks.title: Audit API Key Fix
subtasks.expected_output: Current status of the API key fix
subtasks.prompt: Check the current status of the API key fix and report any issues.

subtasks.title: Gather Mission Priorities
subtasks.expected_output: List of current RPGPO mission priorities
subtasks.prompt: Research and list the current mission priorities of RPGPO.

subtasks.title: Decide on API Key Fix
subtasks.expected_output: Decision on the effectiveness of the API key fix
subtasks.prompt: Based on the audit, decide if the API key fix is effective or if further action is needed.

subtasks.title: Implement API Key Fix
subtasks.expected_output: Implementation of necessary changes to the API key
subtasks.prompt: Implement the necessary changes to fix the API key issue.

subtasks.title: Report Mission Priorities
subtasks.expected_output: A paragraph summarizing RPGPO mission priorities
subtasks.prompt: Summarize the current RPGPO mission priorities in one paragraph.

title: Inspect TopRanker API performance bottlenecks, propose the first fix, implement
raw_request: Inspect TopRanker API performance bottlenecks, propose the first fix, implement the safest code change, and stop for approval before commit/push.

title: Check TopRanker user growth metrics and recommend next marketing action
raw_request: Check TopRanker user growth metrics and recommend next marketing action

board_deliberation.interpreted_objective: Analyze user growth metrics and recommend a marketing action to boost TopRanker growth.
board_deliberation.expected_outcome: A clear, actionable marketing strategy based on current user growth metrics.
key_unknowns: Current user growth metrics
Current marketing strategies in place
User demographics and engagement patterns
board_deliberation.recommended_strategy: First, gather and analyze current user growth metrics to understand trends and patterns. Then, identify potential marketing strategies that align with these insights. Finally, recommend a specific marketing action to enhance user growth.
approval_points: Approval of the recommended marketing action

subtasks.title: Audit Current User Growth Metrics
subtasks.expected_output: A summary of current user growth metrics and trends.
subtasks.prompt: Analyze the current user growth metrics for TopRanker. Identify trends and patterns in user acquisition, retention, and engagement.

subtasks.title: Identify Potential Marketing Strategies
subtasks.expected_output: A list of potential marketing strategies based on user growth analysis.
subtasks.prompt: Based on the analyzed user growth metrics, identify potential marketing strategies that could enhance user growth for TopRanker.

subtasks.title: Recommend Specific Marketing Action
subtasks.expected_output: A recommended marketing action to boost user growth.
subtasks.prompt: Recommend a specific marketing action to boost user growth for TopRanker, based on the identified strategies.

title: Audit TopRanker API endpoints for performance issues and produce the first prior
raw_request: Audit TopRanker API endpoints for performance issues and produce the first prioritized fix plan

board_deliberation.interpreted_objective: Audit and identify performance issues in TopRanker's API endpoints and create a prioritized plan for fixes.
board_deliberation.expected_outcome: A list of performance issues in API endpoints with a prioritized plan for fixes, ready for implementation.
key_unknowns: Recent changes to API logic or infrastructure
Current load and performance metrics for each endpoint
Specific API endpoints with performance issues
board_deliberation.recommended_strategy: First, audit the API endpoints to identify performance bottlenecks. Then, analyze the root causes of these issues. Finally, create a prioritized plan for addressing the most impactful issues first.
approval_points: Approval of the prioritized fix plan

subtasks.title: Audit API Performance
subtasks.expected_output: List of API endpoints with performance issues
subtasks.prompt: Analyze the current API endpoints in the TopRanker project to identify any performance issues. Focus on response times, load handling, and any known bottlenecks.

subtasks.title: Locate Files for API Fixes
subtasks.expected_output: List of files related to API performance issues
subtasks.prompt: Identify the specific files in the TopRanker project that are likely to contain the code for the API endpoints identified with performance issues.

subtasks.title: Analyze Root Causes
subtasks.expected_output: Analysis of root causes for performance issues
subtasks.prompt: For each API endpoint with identified performance issues, analyze the root causes. Consider factors such as database query efficiency, code complexity, and server configuration.

subtasks.title: Create Prioritized Fix Plan
subtasks.expected_output: Prioritized plan for fixing API performance issues
subtasks.prompt: Based on the analysis of root causes, create a prioritized plan for fixing the performance issues in the API endpoints. Focus on high-impact changes that can be implemented quickly.

title: Audit TopRanker API endpoints for performance issues and produce the first prior
raw_request: Audit TopRanker API endpoints for performance issues and produce the first prioritized fix plan

board_deliberation.interpreted_objective: Identify and prioritize performance issues in TopRanker's API endpoints.
board_deliberation.expected_outcome: A prioritized plan for fixing performance issues in the API, improving response times and overall system efficiency.
key_unknowns: Current performance metrics of each API endpoint
Specific performance bottlenecks in the API
Impact of each bottleneck on user experience
board_deliberation.recommended_strategy: Conduct a thorough audit of the API endpoints to gather performance metrics and identify bottlenecks. Prioritize these issues based on their impact on user experience and system performance. Develop a plan to address the most critical issues first, ensuring improvements are measurable and aligned with TopRanker's objectives.
approval_points: Approval for implementing changes that may affect live API performance

subtasks.title: Audit API Performance Metrics
subtasks.expected_output: A list of current performance metrics for each API endpoint.
subtasks.prompt: Analyze TopRanker's API endpoints and gather current performance metrics, including response times, error rates, and throughput.

subtasks.title: Identify API Bottlenecks
subtasks.expected_output: A list of identified performance bottlenecks in the API.
subtasks.prompt: Identify performance bottlenecks in TopRanker's API based on the gathered metrics and any known issues.

subtasks.title: Prioritize API Performance Issues
subtasks.expected_output: A prioritized list of performance issues to address.
subtasks.prompt: Prioritize the identified API performance issues based on their impact on user experience and system performance.

subtasks.title: Develop Fix Plan
subtasks.expected_output: A detailed plan for fixing the prioritized API performance issues.
subtasks.prompt: Create a detailed plan to address the prioritized API performance issues, including specific actions and timelines.

subtasks.title: Report Findings and Plan
subtasks.expected_output: A report summarizing the findings and the fix plan.
subtasks.prompt: Summarize the audit findings and the fix plan for TopRanker's API performance issues.

title: Audit TopRanker API endpoints for performance issues and identify any N+1 querie
raw_request: Audit TopRanker API endpoints for performance issues and identify any N+1 queries or missing indexes
desired_outcome: Performance audit report with specific optimization recommendations

board_deliberation.interpreted_objective: Audit TopRanker API endpoints for performance issues, focusing on N+1 queries and missing indexes.
board_deliberation.expected_outcome: A detailed performance audit report highlighting specific optimization recommendations for TopRanker API endpoints.
key_unknowns: Current performance metrics of API endpoints
Specific API endpoints that may have N+1 query issues
Indexes that may be missing in the database schema
board_deliberation.recommended_strategy: Conduct a systematic audit of the TopRanker API endpoints to identify performance bottlenecks. Focus on detecting N+1 query patterns and missing database indexes. Use this information to generate a report with targeted optimization recommendations.
approval_points: Approval for implementing changes based on audit findings

subtasks.title: Identify API Endpoints
subtasks.expected_output: List of all API endpoints in the TopRanker application.
subtasks.prompt: List all API endpoints in the TopRanker application, focusing on those that handle database interactions.

subtasks.title: Detect N+1 Queries
subtasks.expected_output: List of API endpoints with potential N+1 query issues.
subtasks.prompt: Analyze the API endpoints and identify any N+1 query patterns.

subtasks.title: Check for Missing Indexes
subtasks.expected_output: List of tables with missing indexes that could improve performance.
subtasks.prompt: Examine the database schema and identify any tables that may benefit from additional indexes.

subtasks.title: Compile Audit Report
subtasks.expected_output: Comprehensive audit report with findings and optimization recommendations.
subtasks.prompt: Compile the findings from the audit into a detailed report, including specific recommendations for addressing N+1 queries and adding missing indexes.
